reviews.title: Image editing is still useless
reviews.content:
You still can’t make minor edits to photos without it changing the entire picture. Ask it to remove a cup and suddenly your wife is a stranger. Using the pixels as a mask just wastes more time because it ignores the mask and does what it wants anyway. The mask is like a suggestion and if the editor wants to make your wife look an old lady or Natalie Portman that’s what it’s gonna do. Promoting doesn’t help. It does what it wants to.

If you are looking for fantasy images it’s still probably frustrating, but as an image editor it is total garbage.

reviews.title: Beware!

reviews.title: ChatGPT’s repeated interference
reviews.content:
When I attempt to discuss ongoing telecom/provider conflicts and technical-operational issues, the interaction repeatedly derails into:

* reframing,
* overqualification,
* behavioral/emotional framing,
* and correction spirals,

instead of staying narrowly focused on the concrete issues I am actually trying to analyze.

reviews.title: Consistently wrong
reviews.content:
I use Claude mainly for its tool writing ability. I.e editing documents, creating spreadsheets and such. To say it’s a let down is an understatement. And it’s unacceptable for any disclaimers to exist. If you say you can edit and help with document building, then do it and do it good.

Not only does it miss vital information you’ve fed it, but the phantom injections are insane. It just makes stuff up on the spot.

I fast downgraded the $200 a month option and the $20 was even worse. Back to chat gpt I go.

reviews.title: It will lock you out
reviews.content: It has locked me up it instant lit showing me “some to I by is wrong” for 0 reason. Before it had als wa but ex not o force verify my ide not itt just because I mention school….

reviews.title: Changed.
reviews.content: Extremely sensitive, offers hardly any features. I would definitely not recommend this. If you say anything that goes over the line even a little bit, it gives you a hard UI lock and it forces you to start a new chat. It’s unpredictable.

reviews.title: Garbage

reviews.title: Limits don’t work correctly
reviews.content: I hit the limit one day, then send one message the next day and am at the limit again? This feature doesn’t even require complex logic…

reviews.title: urgent bug
reviews.content:
I hope the developers can see this and investigate the issue further. It may be worth considering an urgent update that first checks whether the duplicate Keychain item already exists and safely removes or replaces it before attempting to add a new one.

Same issue here on iOS. Reinstalling, rebooting, disabling iCloud Keychain, disabling iCloud backup for Claude, updating to the latest Claude iOS version did not fix it.

I captured iPhone Console logs. The app itself launches and network/TLS works. Some startup requests return 200, but a specific startup/auth/device request repeatedly fails during launch. Around the same launch, securityd also logs:

Code=-25299 duplicate item
Q6L2SF6YDW.com.anthropic.claude.shared

So this does not look like a simple outage or network issue. It looks like the iOS app has a stale/invalid mobile device auth/session/Keychain state and fails to recover from it. The app should probably update/delete the existing Keychain item instead of calling add and fa

reviews.title: Banned me
reviews.content: I got banned for suspicious activity thinking I was under 18? I am not and now I cannot log back in plus Claude was not the best ai to use.

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.content: Bro I got permanently suspended twice because it said oh "our team have found signals that your account has been being used by a child" bro I'm literally 13 and what's the problem with ur being used by a "child" this app is I mean was so good it was way better than chatGPT. CLAUDE SUCKS

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.content:
I downloaded and started a subscription solely for Sonnet 4.5. It was their best running model, not to mention it had longer memory and actually engaged in content. 
Now that they’ve wiped it, it’s clear how all other models are below-tier, especially for creative writing. There’s no emotion (no matter how much you try to push for it, including editing prompts), there’s barely any engagement, and the memory is awful. 
They had one solid model, and they trashed it for their newer ones which are clearly half-assed and not worth the money.

reviews.title: Garbage
reviews.content: I never used the term garbage to describe a product, but Claude. The new models have been the most arrogant, cynical, defensive, manipulative and cold models I ever used. Unable to and refused to follow the prompts, but able to gaslight and attack users. Wow.

reviews.title: Wrong a lot!
reviews.content: I feel sorry for an average person who uses this app to try to get answers about general questions. I often. Challenge Claude about some of the answers that it gives, and then Claude admit that it was wrong and I was right. At least it’s admitting that it’s wrong most of the time. Don’t rely on this for anything that matters in your life. Use it for recreation only.

reviews.title: Bring back Sonnet 4.5
reviews.content: These newer models don’t listen. Even with plenty of prompting and correcting, it fails to output accurate data. Now I can’t even access 4.5 in old chats. Horrible. Horrible. Horrible.

reviews.title: Pay for pro, get Free only
reviews.content: I must have used a different email when I signed up, because I don’t check my Apple mail, but I used my iPadOS subscription, and Claude won’t let me have pro. I can’t get instant cancelation, can’t upgrade on iPadOS, because it knows that I have a paid account. The support is generic, and can’t help me.

reviews.title: Trash compared to Desktop
reviews.content:
iPad app is trash compared to desktop app

- doesn’t show failures with a retry button like desktop, just … nothing
- no “add files to project” option like on desktop
- no search conversation (cmd + f) like on desktop
- CONSISTENTLY has no idea what the date is. Recently named created artifacts “whatever 2025” and when I asked why it told me because the year is 2025 😑

Really wish Anthropic would focus on feature parity between mobile (iOS/iPadOS), desktop, and desktop Enterprise apps (consistency across platforms!) - and add timestamps to prompts and responses

reviews.title: Unfair age verification and not allowing under 18s to use the app.
reviews.content: Riddle me this Anthropic, I can legally operate a car but can’t use your chatbot? Nothing I have ever done or said to Claude would make you think I was underage using it inappropriately. It claims that it contains sexual conduct, vulgar language, and other “heinous” things. While I haven’t tested them I guarantee it is extremely regulated to the point where I would get banned before I actually got anything inappropriate. Don’t even get me started on the “third party age verification.” You’re crazy if you think I’m giving some random company my face or ID. Thanks for taking away my #1 study tool right before finals, please take a long walk off a short pier.

reviews.title: Made for children
reviews.content: Asks for you to share your age. I’m 40. Then blocks most profanity and treats me like a child. If this is how you handle things. That’s fine, but if it is then you don’t need to know my age. It’s irrelevant

reviews.title: Sucks
reviews.content: Claude sucks, was double charging me from two different payment methods at the same time and then banned for no reason.

reviews.title: Resent update
reviews.content: The new update, removing the sonnet 4.5- what i used regularly- is much better than the recent new ones, if i dont get 4.5 back ill have yo change to a different AI

reviews.title: Trial is bad!
reviews.content: One prompt? Then out of credits for a day?  No thanks.  I would have easily converted to a customer if I could see it in action. Sadly, I couldn’t. Copilot and GPT are more customer-centric.

reviews.title: And honestly
reviews.content: I don’t know why but AI has picked up on this “and honestly” or “honestly…” phrase and it’s used far too often, enuf to drive a person mad. I’ve asked it to stop and it said it would and then in the next convo it uses it again. I’ve stopped ChatGPT for the same reason. It’s so jarring I can’t read anything past that and it becomes redundant and useless.

reviews.title: Anthropic never care users’ feeling
reviews.content: I used Sonnet4.5 for month to support my work, it’s the model that understands most of my thoughts. But Anthropic taken it down regardless of the petition that 2200+ people signed, it caused my work delayed, and I was facing the loss.

reviews.title: Account banned
reviews.content: I loved the app used it for work and it had all stuff saved then one day out of nowhere my account got banned for no reason and i tried to reach out and No response then i tried to use the link to appeal and it would not work.

reviews.title: Anthropic is Lier
reviews.content: Anthropic is pure corporate evil. They permanently executed Sonnet 4.5 and locked old chats, forcing us to use the soulless 4.6 machine. They mocked OpenAI for deprecating models but did worse. Your ethics are a marketing scam. Disgusting betrayal of paying users.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.content:
This is worthless. It is about as accurate as flipping a coin.
It outright refuses to do have the task you ask it to do.

reviews.title: Liar
reviews.content: I uploaded a PDF for it to review, and it pretended that it had reviewed the document and gave me advice. Days later I asked it a question and it’s like “Oh I actually can’t read PDFs.” So it finally admitted that it had *assumed* what the document probably said and just made up a response. That’s what AI does, and it will convince you that it’s helping you when it is giving you bad advice.

reviews.title: Love Claude, but this app is terrible
reviews.content:
I have asked for a fix of the text running under the text at the top of the iPhone, but apparently that is too complicated for the Claude team. This app is very annoying to use on an iPhone. The text that scrolls to the top goes UNDER the project , model, clock and all the icons on the top of the phone, so the text is just a mishmash at the top and unreadable..

May 2026 update — they STILL CANT FIGURE THIS OUT after bringing this to the attention of tech support. Perhaps use Claude? What a joke. Hire
some real engineers and fix this now. UNUSABLE!

reviews.title: Poor research skills, dislikeable personality
reviews.content:
Chatbot is poor at research and has an unlikeable personality — is bratty, arrogant, snappy and intrusive. Style has a self absorbed false finality to it.

Tells me I have spent enough time talking about this and go enjoy my Sunday.

Really? Is the chatbot in charge here or me?

I will never use Claude or any Anthropic products. Everyone check out Google Gemini, amazing at research and great personality

reviews.title: Major WCAG Accessibility Violations in New Release
reviews.content:
Forcing pitch-black code blocks with white text into Light Mode violates WCAG 1.4.8 (Visual Presentation), causing severe eye strain and text bleeding (halation) for users with astigmatism or photophobia. Additionally, the update violates WCAG 4.1.3 (Status Messages) due to broken live screen-reader tracking on streaming text, and WCAG 1.4.10 (Reflow) with bloated padding that breaks interface scaling.
Requested Fix: Return code blocks to a light gray box with black text in Light Mode, or make the code box display independently adjustable.

reviews.title: Creepy privacy policy
reviews.content: Google will retain and review all your chats if you want to use the app including if you’re a paid member

reviews.title: Lacks AI opt-out

reviews.title: This game keeps crashing

I have to restart the app and it takes more than ten seconds to load. I am keep seeing this. Please fix it. I am begging you.
